title: Datadog Inc (DDOG) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth
text: Datadog Inc DDOG Q2 2024 Earnings Highlights. Financial Performance: Datadog delivered strong results with revenue of 645 million representing 27 percent year-over-year growth and exceeding guidance. The company achieved a free cash flow of 144 million with a 22 percent margin demonstrating robust financial health. Billings reached 667 million up 28 percent annually. Customer Expansion: The platform expanded its customer base to approximately 28,700 customers compared to 26,100 the prior year. High-value accounts grew significantly with customers generating 100,000 plus in annual recurring revenue increasing to about 3,390 from 2,990. Operational Metrics: Gross Margin 82.1 percent, Operating Margin 24 percent, Net Revenue Retention: Mid-110s range. Remaining Performance Obligations: 1.79 billion up 43 percent year-over-year. Growth Drivers: Platform adoption strengthened with 83 percent of customers using two or more products and 49 percent using four or more products. New offerings including LLM Observability and Bits AI enhance capabilities in the evolving AI market. Challenges: Sequential revenue growth slowed to its lowest level in recent years and margin compression suggests cost pressures.
